auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Freshservice API key used as the HTTP Basic auth username. Find it in your Freshservice profile settings as documented by Freshworks: https://support.freshservice.com/support/solutions/articles/50000000029-where-do-i-find-my-api-key-.

extraFields.label: Domain
extraFields.description: Freshservice account domain used to build https://<domain>.freshservice.com API requests.

extraFields.label: Workspace ID
extraFields.description: Optional default Freshservice workspace ID stored for MSP or multi-workspace accounts.

actions.name: create_service_request
actions.description: Create a Freshservice service request for one service catalog item.

itemDisplayId.description: Display ID of the Freshservice service catalog item to request.

email.description: Requester email address used for the Freshservice service request.

quantity.description: Quantity of the requested catalog item.

parentTicketId.description: Parent Freshservice ticket display ID used when creating a child service request.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

additionalProperties.description: One Freshservice service item custom field value.

customFields.description: Freshservice service item custom field values keyed by upstream field name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Freshservice service request from one catalog item.

outputSchema.description: Freshservice create service request response wrapper.

actions.name: create_ticket
actions.description: Create a Freshservice ticket for an incident or service request workflow.

description.description: HTML description of the Freshservice ticket.

status.description: Freshservice ticket status value. Common defaults are 2=open, 3=pending, 4=resolved, and 5=closed.

priority.description: Freshservice ticket priority value. Common defaults are 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high, and 4=urgent.

email.description: Requester email address used to create the Freshservice ticket.

requesterId.description: Requester identifier used when the requester already exists in Freshservice.

name.description: Requester name used when creating a new contact from the ticket.

source.description: Freshservice ticket source value. Common values include 1=email, 2=portal, 3=phone, 7=chat, 8=feedback widget, and 9=outbound email.

impact.description: Freshservice ticket impact value. Common defaults are 1=low, 2=medium, and 3=high.

urgency.description: Freshservice ticket urgency value. Common defaults are 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high, and 4=critical.

emailConfigId.description: Freshservice email configuration identifier used for outbound email ticket creation.

groupId.description: Support group identifier assigned to the ticket.

responderId.description: Agent identifier assigned to the ticket.

requestedForId.description: Identifier of the user on whose behalf the request is raised.

departmentId.description: Department identifier assigned to the ticket.

category.description: Category value assigned to the ticket.

subCategory.description: Sub-category value assigned to the ticket.

itemCategory.description: Item category value assigned to the ticket.

dueBy.description: SLA due-by timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

frDueBy.description: First-response due-by timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tags.description: Tags to attach to the Freshservice ticket.

ccEmails.description: CC email addresses added to an outbound email ticket.

customFields.description: Freshservice custom field values keyed by upstream field name.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Freshservice ticket.

actions.name: get_ticket
actions.description: Get one Freshservice ticket by identifier with optional include expansions.

ticketId.description: Freshservice ticket identifier or display identifier.

items.description: A Freshservice include token used to embed related ticket details in the response.

include.description: Freshservice include tokens to expand related records in ticket responses.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Freshservice ticket.

actions.name: list_locations
actions.description: List Freshservice locations to help callers resolve account-level location metadata.

page.description: Page number for the Freshservice list request.

perPage.description: Maximum number of records to return per Freshservice page.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Freshservice locations.

locations.description: Freshservice locations returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether another Freshservice locations page is likely available.

anyOf.description: The next Freshservice locations page number when available.

actions.name: list_service_catalog_items
actions.description: List Freshservice service catalog items so callers can discover item display IDs before placing requests.

page.description: Page number for the Freshservice list request.

perPage.description: Maximum number of records to return per Freshservice page.

searchTerm.description: Optional search term used to search Freshservice service catalog items.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Freshservice service catalog items.

items.description: A Freshservice service catalog item object.
Freshservice service catalog items returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether another Freshservice service catalog page is likely available.

anyOf.description: The next Freshservice service catalog page number when available.

outputSchema.description: Freshservice service catalog list response wrapper.

actions.name: list_tickets
actions.description: List Freshservice tickets with optional filters, pagination, and include expansions.

page.description: Page number for the Freshservice list request.

perPage.description: Maximum number of records to return per Freshservice page.

filter.description: Freshservice predefined ticket filter to apply.

items.description: A Freshservice include token used to embed related ticket details in the response.

include.description: Freshservice include tokens to expand related records in ticket responses.

orderBy.description: Freshservice ticket field used for ordering results.

updatedSince.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used as the updated_since Freshservice filter.

workspaceId.description: Workspace identifier used for MSP or multi-workspace Freshservice accounts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Freshservice tickets.

tickets.description: Freshservice tickets returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether another Freshservice page is likely available.

anyOf.description: The next Freshservice page number when another page is available.
